creator: cristianorolim@hotmail.com
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
# phplogcon/
# phplogcon/Makefile
# phplogcon/distinfo
# phplogcon/pkg-descr
# phplogcon/pkg-plist
#
echo c - phplogcon/
mkdir -p phplogcon/ > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - phplogcon/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >phplogcon/Makefile << 'END-of-phplogcon/Makefile'
XPORTNAME= phplogcon
XPORTVERSION= 2.5.23
XCATEGORIES= sysutils www
XMASTER_SITES= http://download.adiscon.com/phplogcon/
X
XMAINTAINER= cristianorolim@hotmail.com
XCOMMENT= Web Based Syslog Review
X
X.if !defined(WITHOUT_PHP_DEPENDS)
XUSE_PHP= YES
XWANT_PHP_WEB= YES
X.endif
XNO_BUILD= YES
XLOGCONDIR?= www/phplogcon
XPLIST_SUB+= LOGCONDIR=${LOGCONDIR}
X
Xpre-everything::
X @${ECHO_CMD} "# you can customize the installation directory"
X @${ECHO_CMD} "# by setting LOGCON in /etc/make.conf"
X
X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X
Xdo-install:
X ${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/${LOGCONDIR}
X ${CP} -Rp ${WRKSRC}/src/ ${PREFIX}/${LOGCONDIR}/
X
Xpost-install:
X.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
X ${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
X ${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/doc/* ${DOCSDIR}
X.endif
X.if !defined(NOPORTDATA)
X ${MKDIR} ${DATADIR}
X ${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/contrib/* ${DATADIR}
X.endif
X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
END-of-phplogcon/Makefile
echo x - phplogcon/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >phplogcon/distinfo << 'END-of-phplogcon/distinfo'
XMD5 (phplogcon-2.5.23.tar.gz) = ab150ebeec5c45b3d49632b6ec64968e
XSHA256 (phplogcon-2.5.23.tar.gz) = d3ab99a4f73ffaba7143792f72877ff19b19b2f5f92b4db412c814643ab9a958
XSIZE (phplogcon-2.5.23.tar.gz) = 889842
END-of-phplogcon/distinfo
echo x - phplogcon/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >phplogcon/pkg-descr << 'END-of-phplogcon/pkg-descr'
XThe phpLogCon project provides an easy to use but powerful front end for
Xsearching, reviewing and analyzing network event data, including syslog,
Xwindows event log and many other event sources. It focusses on the
Xuser-interface side of this project, so the data itself needs to be
Xgathered by another program, for example the stock syslogd, rsyslog (often
Xthe distro's default syslogd), WinSyslog or MonitorWare Agent.
X
XPhpLogCon is a free, GPLed open source application written mostly in php.
XData can be obtained from databases but also from plain text files,
Xfor example those that are written by the syslogd. 
X
XWWW: http://www.phplogcon.org/
END-of-phplogcon/pkg-descr
echo x - phplogcon/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >phplogcon/pkg-plist << 'END-of-phplogcon/pkg-plist'
